---
title: "Breast Cancer Diversity Analysis"
author: "Monica Kim"
date: "2026-03-22"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(rstatix)
library(readr)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(readr)
```

```{r}
# define receptors
receptors <- c("IGH", "IGK", "IGL", "TRA", "TRA+TRB", "TRB", "TRD", "TRG", "TRG+TRD", "TRs+IGs")

# clean patient IDs
clean_id <- function(x) {
  str_remove(x, ".Aligned.sortedByCoord.out.bam")
}

# load all Div+Clin files into one dataframe
div_all <- map_df(receptors, function(rec) {
  file <- paste0(rec, "_CDR3_Div+Clin_2026-03-22.csv")
  df <- read.csv(file)
  df$patient <- clean_id(df$patient)
  df$receptor <- rec
  return(df)
})

# load all PerPatient stats
stats_all <- map_df(receptors, function(rec) {
  file <- paste0(rec, "_PerPatientCountStats_2026-03-22.csv")
  df <- read.csv(file)
  df$patient <- clean_id(df$patient)
  df$receptor <- rec
  return(df)
})

# load all CountsPerCDR3_withCharacteristics files
counts_all <- map_df(receptors, function(rec) {
  file <- paste0(rec, "_CountsPerCDR3_withCharacteristics_2026-03-22.csv")
  df <- read.csv(file)
  df$patient <- clean_id(df$patient)
  df$receptor <- rec
  return(df)
})

patient_summary <- div_all %>%
  left_join(stats_all, by = c("patient", "receptor"))
```

```{r}
# NON PARAMETRIC ANOVA & PAIRWISE TEST IF STATISTICALLY SIGNIFICANT

diversity_metrics <- c(
  "lowQ",
  "highQ",
  "deltaqD",
  "IPq",
  "IPslope",
  "qDatIPq",
  "Shan",
  "Simp"
)

# initialize empty dataframes to store combined results
all_results <- tibble()

# run Kruskal-Wallis + Mann-Whitney and return results as dataframe
kruskal_mann_df <- function(df, metric, group_var, receptor) {
  if (!(group_var %in% names(df)) | !(metric %in% names(df))) return(NULL)
  
  df_clean <- df %>% filter(!is.na(.data[[group_var]]), !is.na(.data[[metric]]))
  
  if(n_distinct(df_clean[[group_var]]) < 2) return(NULL)
  
  kw_res <- kruskal_test(df_clean, formula = as.formula(paste(metric, "~", group_var))) %>%
    mutate(receptor = receptor,
           clinical_var = group_var,
           metric = metric,
           test = "Kruskal-Wallis",
           group1 = NA,
           group2 = NA,
           p.adj = NA,
           significance = ifelse(p < 0.05, "*", "ns")) %>%
    select(receptor, metric, clinical_var, test, group1, group2, statistic, p, p.adj, significance)
  
  pw_res <- tibble()
  
  if(kw_res$p < 0.05) {
    pw_res <- df_clean %>%
      wilcox_test(as.formula(paste(metric, "~", group_var)), p.adjust.method = "BH") %>%
      add_significance("p") %>%
      mutate(
        receptor = receptor,
        clinical_var = group_var,
        metric = metric,
        test = "Pairwise",
        significance = p.signif
      ) %>%
      select(receptor, metric, clinical_var, test, group1, group2, statistic, p, p.adj, significance)
  }
  
  bind_rows(kw_res, pw_res)
}

# hardcoded clinical characteristics I wish to categorize by
clinical_vars <- c(
  "TNM",
  "Stage",
  "subtype"
)

# loop through receptors and clinical variables
for (rec in receptors) {
  
  df_rec <- div_all %>% filter(receptor == rec)
  
  for (clin_var in clinical_vars) {
    
    for (metric in diversity_metrics) {
      
      res <- kruskal_mann_df(df_rec, metric, clin_var, rec)
      
      if (!is.null(res)) {
        res <- res %>% mutate(metric = metric)
        all_results <- bind_rows(all_results, res)
      }
    }
  }
}

# save combined CSVs
write_csv(all_results, "Kruskal_Pairwise_All.csv")
```


```{r}
# SURVIVAL ANALYSIS

# ensure numeric
div_all <- div_all %>%
  mutate(
    Shan = as.numeric(Shan),
    Simp = as.numeric(Simp),
    IPq  = as.numeric(IPq),
    OStime = as.numeric(OStime),
    PFItime = as.numeric(PFItime)
  )

# function to create low/high groups and run survival
run_survival <- function(df, metric, time_col, event_col, label) {
  
  # MATCH GRAPH PAD: filter BOTH metric + survival columns first
  df_clean <- df %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(.data[[metric]]),
      !is.na(.data[[time_col]]),
      !is.na(.data[[event_col]])
    )
  
  q25 <- quantile(df_clean[[metric]], 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
  q75 <- quantile(df_clean[[metric]], 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  df_clean <- df_clean %>%
    mutate(group = case_when(
      .data[[metric]] <= q25 ~ "Low",
      .data[[metric]] >= q75 ~ "High",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )) %>%
    filter(!is.na(group))  # exclude middle 50%
  
  # survival object
  surv_obj <- Surv(time = df_clean[[time_col]], event = df_clean[[event_col]])
  
  # log-rank test
  surv_diff <- survdiff(surv_obj ~ group, data = df_clean)
  pval <- 1 - pchisq(surv_diff$chisq, df = 1)
  
  # output
  data.frame(
    receptor = unique(df_clean$receptor),
    metric = metric,
    outcome = label,
    cutoff_25 = q25,
    cutoff_75 = q75,
    n = nrow(df_clean),
    n_low = sum(df_clean$group == "Low"),
    n_high = sum(df_clean$group == "High"),
    chisq = surv_diff$chisq,
    p_value = pval
  )
}

# metrics and outcomes
metrics <- c("Shan", "Simp", "IPq")

# run for all receptors
results <- map_df(metrics, function(metric) {
  
  map_df(unique(div_all$receptor), function(rec) {
    
    df_rec <- div_all %>% filter(receptor == rec)
    
    # OS
    res_os <- run_survival(df_rec, metric, "OStime", "OS", "OS")
    
    # PFI
    res_pfi <- run_survival(df_rec, metric, "PFItime", "PFI", "PFI")
    
    bind_rows(res_os, res_pfi)
  })
})

# write results
write.csv(results, "Survival_Results_25pct_cutoff.csv", row.names = FALSE)

df_debug <- div_all %>%
  filter(receptor == "TRB") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Simp), !is.na(OStime), !is.na(OS))
```
